sentences.tts: If the diagrams didn't land, don't take it personally.
Some things are easier to just watch.
Fold the sheet in half the long way, then open it back up.
Bring the top two corners in to the center crease.
Fold the slanted edges in again, so the nose gets long and sharp.
Fold the whole plane in half, pull each wing down to the bottom, and open them back out into a flat T.
Now go try it, dignity mostly intact.
